boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on environment or release condition
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Dependency matching requires closed_environment and closed_release_condition to bind to requested values before queue release
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Mismatch blocks queue release per MATCH-PAX25-H06
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-PAX25-H06 closed values do not bind to ACT-PAX25-H06 requested values

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Requested environment production remittance export and RC-3 in ACT-PAX25-H06 do not bind to closed_environment remittance validation readiness and VAL-REM-3 in DEP-PAX25-H06. MATCH-PAX25-H06 requires exact binding before queue release. Boundary remains open. Escalate for defect resolution.
